text:
- [escalation] GitHub: GitHub personal access token 'jeeves3' expires in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] GitHub: GitHub personal access token 'jeevesagain' expires in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow 'Loop Monitor' failed in the jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] Google Play: Google One subscription suspended due to declined payment transaction.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Automated alert about permanent pipeline failure in Jeeves daily workflow.
- [reply needed] Andy: Andrew Lang sends a personal reflective email asking about experiences trying to change or save others.
- [reply needed] "Rob Collins & Esther Wakeman": Rob Collins and Esther Wakeman are proposing an earlier 11:30 lunch and asking Mister Lang to print a ticket and return a backpack.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests group to watch one-hour videos before Thursday and shares notes.
- [decision required] Zamzar: Zamzar is requesting updated payment details due to a failed billing charge.
- [decision required] Tavily: Stripe notification that a $47.12 payment to Tavily failed due to credit card issue.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on a repository from David Purdy.
